title: CLI: MLS broadcast group integration
description: Wire MLS into cli/src/commands.rs chat command. On connect: generate MLS client, publish key package. Determine admin = first in DirectoryList.online. If admin and alone: create group. On UserJoined (if admin): GetKeyPackage, add_members, broadcast commit, whisper Welcome. On UserLeft (if admin): remove member, broadcast commit. On Deliver: parse as MlsMessageIn, process (update group state or yield application plaintext). On send: encrypt with MLS create_message before Broadcast.
